nasb.text: On an appointed day Herod, having put on his royal apparel, took his seat on the rostrum and began delivering an address to them.

esv.text: On an appointed day Herod put on his royal robes, took his seat upon the throne, and delivered an oration to them.

cnv.text: 到了定好的日期，希律穿上王服，坐在高臺上，向他們演講。

ccb.text: 到了约定的日子，希律穿上王袍，坐在宝座上向众人致词。

csbs.text: 在指定的日子，希律穿上王袍，坐在审判席上，向他们公开演说。
